---
title: "DATRAS Field Reference"
subtitle: "Technical companion to D2.2 — Data Formats and Metadata"
---

This document is the technical lookup reference for the DATRAS exchange tables. For project context, scope, data flow, conceptual table overviews, CPUE calculation pathways, and the proposed intermediate parquet products, see [D2.2 — Data Formats and Metadata](D2.2_data_formats_metadata.qmd).

---

## Complete Field Reference (HH, HL, CA) {#field-reference}

Source: `dr_lookup_fields` (names, types, descriptions) and `dr_lookup_vocabulary` (valid values).
Type codes: `chr` = character, `int` = integer, `dbl` = double. Missing values are `NA`; the
DATRAS legacy sentinel `−9` is replaced on fetch. Seven standard names map to more than one
legacy name across record types (e.g. `Platform` maps to `Ship` in HH/HL/CA but to `Platform`
in FL); this is noted where it applies.

### Shared haul join key

These eight fields appear identically in HH, HL, and CA. `dr_add_id()` collapses them into
`.id`. In child tables (HL, CA) they are redundant once `.id` is added.

| New name | Old name | Type | Description |
|----------|----------|------|-------------|
| `Survey` | `Survey` | chr | Survey acronym (e.g. `"NS-IBTS"`) |
| `Year` | `Year` | int | Cruise year (YYYY) |
| `Quarter` | `Quarter` | int | Cruise quarter; hauls outside calendar quarter may keep the agreed survey quarter |
| `Country` | `Country` | chr | ISO 3166 country code of contributing vessel |
| `Platform` | `Ship` | chr | SeaDataNet vessel code. Note: old name `Platform` in FL |
| `Gear` | `Gear` | chr | Gear type code (e.g. `"GOV"`, `"BT"`) |
| `StationName` | `StNo` | chr | Station identifier; national coding, not ICES-standardised |
| `HaulNumber` | `HaulNo` | int | Sequential haul number within cruise |

Three gear fields are also repeated in HL and CA as submission artefacts; they are redundant with HH:

| New name | Old name | Type | Description |
|----------|----------|------|-------------|
| `GearExceptions` | `GearEx` | chr | Deviations from the standard gear configuration |
| `SweepLength` | `SweepLngt` | int | Length of sweep in metres |
| `DoorType` | `DoorType` | chr | Type of otter board used |

---

### HH — Haul Header fields

Fields unique to HH, excluding the shared join key. Sorted alphabetically by new name within
each group.

#### Haul outcome and sampling protocol

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Valid values | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|--------------|-------------|
| `DataType` | `DataType` | chr | — | `R` raw; `S` sub-sampled; `C` CPUE per hour; `P` pseudocategory | Governs arithmetic for `NumberAtLength` and `TotalNumber` in HL |
| `HaulDuration` | `HaulDur` | int | minutes | — | Duration from gear on bottom to start of hauling |
| `HaulValidity` | `HaulVal` | chr | — | `V` valid; `S` standard; `I` invalid; `P` partly valid; `A` additional; `C` calibrated (BITS); `M` pelagic midwater (BITS); `N` no oxygen (BITS) | Primary haul quality filter; use `"V"` for standard analyses |
| `ReasonHaulDisruption` | *(no old name)* | chr | — | — | Disruption code when haul is invalid or partly valid |

#### Temporal

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|-------------|
| `Month` | `Month` | int | — | Sampling month |
| `Day` | `Day` | int | — | Sampling day |
| `StartTime` | `TimeShot` | chr | HHMM GMT | Shoot time; `dr_add_starttime()` converts to POSIXct |
| `DayNight` | `DayNight` | chr | — | `D` day; `N` night (15 min before sunrise / after sunset) |

#### Position and area

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|-------------|
| `ShootLatitude` | `ShootLat` | dbl | decimal degrees | Latitude at tow start |
| `ShootLongitude` | `ShootLong` | dbl | decimal degrees | Longitude at tow start |
| `HaulLatitude` | `HaulLat` | dbl | decimal degrees | Latitude at tow end |
| `HaulLongitude` | `HaulLong` | dbl | decimal degrees | Longitude at tow end |
| `StatisticalRectangle` | `StatRec` | chr | — | Intended ICES rectangle (0.5° lat × 1° lon); derivable from position |
| `SurveyIndexArea` | `SurveyIndexArea` | chr | — | Survey-specific stratum used for index calculations; vocabulary is survey-specific |
| `DepthStratum` | `DepthStratum` | chr | — | Survey-specific depth band |

#### Gear configuration

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|-------------|
| `Distance` | `Distance` | dbl | metres | Distance between shoot and haul positions |
| `WingSpread` | `WingSpread` | dbl | metres | Mean horizontal trawl opening |
| `DoorSpread` | `DoorSpread` | dbl | metres | Mean distance between otter boards |
| `DoorSurface` | `DoorSurface` | dbl | m² | Door surface area |
| `DoorWeight` | `DoorWgt` | int | kg | Door weight |
| `NetOpening` | `Netopening` | dbl | metres | Mean vertical net opening |
| `CodendMesh` | `CodendMesh` | int | mm | Codend mesh size |
| `WarpLength` | `Warplngt` | int | metres | Length of warp (set by fishing depth) |
| `WarpDiameter` | `Warpdia` | int | mm | Warp diameter |
| `WarpDensity` | `WarpDen` | int | kg/m | Warp weight per linear metre |
| `GroundRopeWeight` | `WgtGroundRope` | int | kg | Total weight of ground rope |
| `Buoyancy` | `Buoyancy` | int | kg | Total buoyancy of net floats |
| `Tickler` | `Tickler` | int | count | Number of ticklers attached |
| `KiteArea` | `KiteDim` | dbl | m² | Kite area |
| `Rigging` | `Rigging` | chr | — | Rigging configuration; survey-specific |
| `TowDirection` | `TowDir` | int | degrees | Direction of towing (360 = N) |
| `SpeedGround` | `GroundSpeed` | dbl | knots | Ground speed of towing |
| `SpeedWater` | `SpeedWater` | dbl | knots | Trawl speed through water |
| `PelagicSamplingType` | `PelSampType` | chr | — | Pelagic trawl sampling type code |
| `MinTrawlDepth` | `MinTrawlDepth` | int | metres | Highest point of pelagic trawling |
| `MaxTrawlDepth` | `MaxTrawlDepth` | int | metres | Lowest point of pelagic trawling |

#### Environmental

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|-------------|
| `BottomDepth` | `Depth` | int | metres | Bottom depth at haul position |
| `BottomTemperature` | `BotTemp` | dbl | °C | Temperature at bottom water layer |
| `SurfaceTemperature` | `SurTemp` | dbl | °C | Temperature at surface water layer |
| `BottomSalinity` | `BotSal` | dbl | PSU | Salinity at bottom water layer |
| `SurfaceSalinity` | `SurSal` | dbl | PSU | Salinity at surface water layer |
| `BottomCurrentDirection` | `BotCurDir` | int | degrees | Bottom current direction (0 = no movement; 360 = S→N) |
| `BottomCurrentSpeed` | `BotCurSpeed` | dbl | m/s | Bottom current speed |
| `SurfaceCurrentDirection` | `SurCurDir` | int | degrees | Surface current direction |
| `SurfaceCurrentSpeed` | `SurCurSpeed` | dbl | m/s | Surface current speed |
| `ThermoCline` | `ThermoCline` | chr | — | `Y` if thermocline (≥2°C change over 10 m depth) observed |
| `ThermoClineDepth` | `ThClineDepth` | int | metres | Depth of thermocline (requires `ThermoCline = "Y"`) |
| `SecchiDepth` | `SecchiDepth` | dbl | metres | Secchi disc visibility depth |
| `Turbidity` | `Turbidity` | int | NTU | Water turbidity |
| `WindDirection` | `WindDir` | int | degrees | Wind direction (0 = calm; 360 = N→S; −1 = variable) |
| `WindSpeed` | `WindSpeed` | int | m/s | Wind speed |
| `SwellDirection` | `SwellDir` | int | degrees | Swell direction (0 = no swell; −1 = varying) |
| `SwellHeight` | `SwellHeight` | dbl | metres | Swell wave height |
| `TidePhase` | `TidePhase` | int | minutes | Minutes before next high tide |
| `TideSpeed` | `TideSpeed` | dbl | m/s | Tidal current speed |
| `HydrographicStationID` | `HydroStNo` | chr | — | National hydrographic station reference |

#### Administrative

| New name | Old name | Type | Description |
|----------|----------|------|-------------|
| `BycatchSpeciesCode` | `BySpecRecCode` | chr | Which bycatch species were recorded |
| `StandardSpeciesCode` | `StdSpecRecCode` | chr | Whether standard species list was recorded |
| `EDMO` | *(no old name)* | chr | EDMO code of the originating institute |
| `RecordHeader` | `RecordType` | chr | Always `"HH"`; structural, dropped in analysis |

---

### HL — Haul-level Length fields

Fields unique to HL, grouped by conceptual layer (see D2.2 Section 6 for the four-layer
explanation).

#### Layer B — Sampling protocol

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Valid values | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|--------------|-------------|
| `SpeciesValidity` | `SpecVal` | chr | — | `1` full; `0` invalid; `4` totals only; `5` presence/absence; `6` weight only; `7` numbers+weight; `8` volume; `9` representative (no products); `10` lengths+numbers | Record type flag; standard products use `"1"` |
| `SpeciesCategory` | `CatIdentifier` | int | — | 1–5 | Subsampling category by size within species/haul; always 1 for DataType C |
| `SubsamplingFactor` | `SubFactor` | dbl | — | ≥1 for R; >1 for S; =1 for C | Raise factor: value of 6 means 1/6 of catch was measured |
| `SubsampledNumber` | `NoMeas` | int | count | — | Total measured specimens per group; equals `sum(NumberAtLength)` |
| `SubsampleWeight` | `SubWgt` | int | grams | — | Weight of the measured subsample |

#### Layer C — Catch totals

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|-------------|
| `SpeciesCode` | `SpecCode` | chr | — | Submitted species code (WoRMS AphiaID, ITIS TSN, or NODC) |
| `SpeciesCodeType` | `SpecCodeType` | chr | — | Code scheme: `W` WoRMS; `T` ITIS TSN; `N` NODC |
| `ValidAphiaID` | `Valid_Aphia` | int | — | Resolved WoRMS AphiaID; use for cross-survey joins |
| `SpeciesSex` | `Sex` | chr | — | `M` male; `F` female; `U` unidentified; `B` berried; `T` neutral. Visual assessment of bulk catch |
| `DevelopmentStage` | `DevStage` | chr | — | Non-invasive maturity/stage code (1–15, J, B, E, a–f); survey-specific |
| `TotalNumber` | `TotalNo` | dbl | — | Total count per group; **DataType-dependent** (see [DataType rules]) |
| `SpeciesCategoryWeight` | `CatCatchWgt` | int | grams | Total catch weight per group; **DataType-dependent** |

#### Layer D — Length frequency

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Valid values | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|--------------|-------------|
| `LengthCode` | `LngtCode` | chr | — | `.` 1 mm (report mm); `0` 0.5 cm (report mm); `1` 1 cm; `2` 2 cm; `5` 5 cm | Determines unit and bin width of `LengthClass` — see [Length Units] |
| `LengthClass` | `LngtClass` | int | see LengthCode | — | Lower boundary of length bin |
| `LengthType` | `LenMeasType` | chr | — | `1` total linear; `2` standard; `3` pre supra-caudal; `4` pre anal-fin; `5` mantle; `6` carapace length; `7` carapace width; `8` second dorsal fin; `9` shell height; `10` shell width; `11` wing width; `12` total curved; `13` pinched tail | Type of length measurement |
| `NumberAtLength` | `HLNoAtLngt` | dbl | count | — | Count in sub-sample at this length class; **DataType-dependent** |

#### Administrative

| New name | Old name | Type | Description |
|----------|----------|------|-------------|
| `RecordHeader` | `RecordType` | chr | Always `"HL"`; structural, dropped in analysis |

---

### CA — Catch-at-age fields

Fields unique to CA, excluding the shared join key.

#### Species and area aggregation

| New name | Old name | Type | Description |
|----------|----------|------|-------------|
| `SpeciesCode` | `SpecCode` | chr | Submitted species code |
| `SpeciesCodeType` | `SpecCodeType` | chr | Code scheme: `W` WoRMS; `T` ITIS TSN (legacy); `N` NODC (legacy) |
| `ValidAphiaID` | `Valid_Aphia` | int | Resolved WoRMS AphiaID |
| `AreaCode` | `AreaCode` | chr | Area identifier according to `AreaType` |
| `AreaType` | `AreaType` | chr | Aggregation level: `H` haul-level (most rows); many area-pool codes also defined. **Check before joining to HH** |
| `FishID` | `FishID` | chr | Individual fish identifier (running number within haul) |

#### Length and age measurements

| New name | Old name | Type | Unit | Valid values | Description |
|----------|----------|------|------|--------------|-------------|
| `LengthCode` | `LngtCode` | chr | — | Same as HL | Unit flag for `LengthClass` |
| `LengthClass` | `LngtClass` | int | see LengthCode | — | Measured individual length (not a bin boundary as in HL) |
| `LengthType` | *(no old name)* | chr | — | Same codes as HL | Type of length measurement |
| `NumberAtLength` | `CANoAtLngt` | dbl | count | — | Count at this length/age class (pooled rows only; distinct scaling from HL) |
| `IndividualAge` | `AgeRings` | int | years | — | Age of specimen from otolith ring count |
| `AgePlusGroup` | `PlusGr` | chr | — | `+` plus group; `-9` not a plus group | Flags fish assigned to the open-ended plus age group |
| `AgeSource` | `AgeSource` | chr | — | `OT` otolith; `SC` scale; `VR` vertebra; `LB` length-based ALK | Biological sample type used for age determination |
| `AgePreparationMethod` | `AgePrepMet` | chr | — | `BK` breaking; `BR` burning; `CP` sectioned; `NO` no oil; `WA` water; `WO` oil | Otolith preparation method |
| `OtolithGrading` | `OtGrading` | chr | — | `1` certain; `2` doubtful; `3` unreadable (no age); `4` unreadable (QA only) | Otolith reader quality score |

#### Sex and maturity (individual, by dissection)

| New name | Old name | Type | Valid values | Description |
|----------|----------|------|--------------|-------------|
| `IndividualSex` | `Sex` | chr | `M` male; `F` female; `U` unidentified; `B` berried; `T` neutral; `N` excluded | Determined by dissection; distinct from `SpeciesSex` in HL (visual/population-level) |
| `IndividualMaturity` | `Maturity` | chr | — | Maturity stage code; `MaturityScale` specifies which scale |
| `MaturityScale` | `MaturityScale` | chr | — | From 2021 only M6 and SMSF accepted |

#### Additional biological sampling

| New name | Old name | Type | Description |
|----------|----------|------|-------------|
| `IndividualWeight` | `IndWgt` | dbl | Measured individual weight in grams |
| `LiverWeight` | `LiverWeight` | dbl | Liver weight in grams (when sampled) |
| `StomachSamplingFlag` | `StomSamp` | chr | Flag whether stomach sampling was performed |
| `ParasiteSamplingFlag` | `ParSamp` | chr | Flag whether parasite sampling was performed |
| `GeneticSamplingFlag` | `GenSamp` | chr | Flag whether genetic sample was taken |

#### Administrative

| New name | Old name | Type | Description |
|----------|----------|------|-------------|
| `RecordHeader` | `RecordType` | chr | Always `"CA"`; structural, dropped in analysis |

---

## LT — Litter Assessment fields

LT shares the same haul join key as HL and CA. All haul-level context is obtained by joining to
`HH.parquet` on `.id`. Accessible via `dr_get("LT", ...)`.

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `LTREF` | Reference list used for litter categorisation |
| `PARAM` | Litter category code |
| `LTSZC` | Size class of the litter item |
| `LTSRC` | Source of litter (if identifiable) |
| `LTPRP` | Litter properties (colour, composition, etc.) |
| `TYPPL` | Plastic type code |
| `LT_Items` | Count of items in category |
| `UnitItem` | Unit for item count |
| `LT_Weight` | Weight of litter in category |
| `UnitWeight` | Unit for weight |

Fields redundant after joining to HH: `BottomDepth`, `EDMO`, `RecordHeader`.
Fields derivable from HH position: `OSPARArea`, `MSFDArea`, `EEZ`, `NMArea`.
Administrative/empty fields: `Reserved1`, `Reserved2`, `DateofCalculation`.

---

## DataType rules {#datatype-rules}

`DataType` is set in HH and **must be joined to HL** before any count or weight arithmetic.
The three HL fields whose meaning changes with `DataType` are:

| Field | DataType R / S / P | DataType C |
|-------|--------------------|-----------:|
| `NumberAtLength` | Count in sub-sample | Numbers per hour (CPUE) |
| `TotalNumber` | Total per-haul count | Total per-hour count |
| `SpeciesCategoryWeight` | Catch weight per haul (grams) | Catch weight per hour (grams) |

Conversion formulas implemented by `dr_add_n_and_cpue()`:

| DataType | `n_haul` | `n_hour` |
|----------|----------|----------|
| R | `NumberAtLength × SubsamplingFactor` (NA treated as 1) | `n_haul / HaulDuration × 60` |
| S / P | `NumberAtLength × SubsamplingFactor` | `n_haul / HaulDuration × 60` |
| C | `NumberAtLength × SubsamplingFactor × HaulDuration / 60` | `NumberAtLength × SubsamplingFactor` |

---

## Length Units {#length-units}

The unit of `LengthClass` depends on `LengthCode` — a frequent source of errors in raw data:

| `LengthCode` | Unit of `LengthClass` | To cm | To mm |
|--------------|-----------------------|-------|-------|
| `"."` or `"0"` | Millimetres | ÷ 10 | as-is |
| `"1"` | Centimetres | as-is | × 10 |
| `"2"` | Centimetres (0.5 cm bins) | as-is | × 10 |
| `"5"` | Centimetres (5 cm bins) | as-is | × 10 |

`dr_add_length_cm()` and `dr_add_length_mm()` encode this rule. Always use the derived `length_cm`
or `length_mm` column in downstream analysis; never use raw `LengthClass` without first checking
`LengthCode`.

---

## Species Identification {#species-id}

DATRAS has used three species coding schemes:

| `SpecCodeType` | Scheme | Era |
|----------------|--------|-----|
| `W` | WoRMS AphiaID | Post ~2010 (current) |
| `T` | ITIS TSN | Historical |
| `N` | NODC | Historical |

`ValidAphiaID` (or `Valid_Aphia` in raw parquets — canonical name pending ICES confirmation)
provides the current WoRMS AphiaID for all records regardless of original coding scheme.

Only records with `SpeciesValidity == "1"` represent standard catch records. Filter to this value
for CPUE and abundance calculations.

Species names: `dr_lookup_species` table (AphiaID ↔ Latin name ↔ common name, 2000+ species).

---

## Area Standardisation {#area-std}

`dr_assign_area()` performs a spatial join from haul shoot positions to survey strata polygons:

```r
# Data frame path (uses dr_lookup_areas by default)
hh |> dr_assign_area()

# DuckDB lazy path (full-resolution polygons from server)
areas_con <- duckdbfs::open_dataset(
  "https://heima.hafro.is/~einarhj/datras/areas.fgb"
) |> dplyr::filter(Valid == 1L)
hh_con |> dr_assign_area(areas = areas_con)
```

`dr_lookup_areas` — 236 valid survey strata as an `sf` object (EPSG:4326).
`dr_get_areas()` — fetches full-resolution (~1028 features) from the ICES ArcGIS REST service.

`StatisticalRectangle` in HH (ICES 1° × 0.5° rectangle) is derivable from position but retained
for convenience. Conversion to C-squares or ICES divisions requires an external lookup; a helper
function is planned but not yet in {obus}.

---

## Data Quality Checks {#qc}

The `dr_check_*()` family returns a one-row tibble per check with columns `check`, `table`,
`n_fail`, `n_total`, `pct_fail`, `detail`. None throw on failure.

| Check | What is tested | Typical failure rate |
|-------|----------------|----------------------|
| `dr_check_sentinels()` | Surviving −9 values in numeric columns | 0% (all replaced on fetch) |
| `dr_check_subfactor()` | R/S: ≥ 1; C: = 1; NA always fails | ~0.015% (NA under DataType R); `dr_add_n_and_cpue()` treats these as SubsamplingFactor = 1 rather than NA |
| `dr_check_totalno()` | R/S: `TotalNumber ≈ sum(NumberAtLength) × SubsamplingFactor` | ~1% for DataType C (rounding artefact) |

Column name defaults are standard (parquet) names. Pass legacy column names explicitly when
working with `dr_con(raw = TRUE)` or `dr_get(source = "xml")` output.

```r
hh <- dr_get("HH", surveys = "NS-IBTS", years = 2024, quarters = 1) |> dr_add_id()
hl <- dr_get("HL", surveys = "NS-IBTS", years = 2024, quarters = 1) |>
  dr_add_id() |>
  dplyr::left_join(dplyr::select(hh, .id, DataType), by = ".id")

dr_check_all(hh = hh, hl = hl)
```

---

## Drop-or-Derive Quick Reference {#drop-derive}

Actions apply once `.id` has been added and child tables have been joined to HH.

| Variable(s) | Table(s) | Action |
|-------------|----------|--------|
| `Survey`, `Year`, `Quarter`, `Country`, `Platform`, `Gear`, `StationName`, `HaulNumber` | HL, CA, LT | **Drop** after `dr_add_id()` + join to HH |
| `GearExceptions`, `SweepLength`, `DoorType` | HL, CA | **Drop** (duplicated from HH) |
| `RecordHeader` | all | **Drop** (always equals the table name) |
| `Month`, `Day`, `StartTime` | HH | → `date` + `time` via `dr_add_date()` / `dr_add_starttime()`; raw fields droppable |
| `LengthCode` + `LengthClass` | HL, CA | → `length_cm` via `dr_add_length_cm()`; raw fields droppable |
| `SpeciesCode` + `SpeciesCodeType` | HL, CA | → `ValidAphiaID` (already resolved in parquets); raw fields droppable |
| `StatisticalRectangle`, `DayNight` | HH | Derivable from position + time; retained for convenience |
| `TotalNumber`, `SpeciesCategoryWeight` | HL | → `n_haul`, `w_haul` (DataType-corrected) in proposed `HL_catch.parquet` |
| `OSPARArea`, `MSFDArea`, `EEZ`, `NMArea` | LT | Derivable from HH position via spatial join |
| `BottomDepth`, `EDMO` | LT | Duplicated from HH |
| `Reserved1`, `Reserved2`, `DateofCalculation` | LT | Drop (empty / administrative) |

---

## {obus} Quick Reference

```r
# Install
remotes::install_github("einarhjorleifsson/obus")
library(obus)

# Lazy access — filter before collecting
dr_con("HH") |> dplyr::filter(Survey == "NS-IBTS", Year == 2023) |> dplyr::collect()
dr_con("HL") |> dplyr::filter(ValidAphiaID == 126417, Year >= 2020) |> dplyr::collect()

# Full download (all surveys / all years from parquet)
hh <- dr_get("HH")

# Specific survey via legacy XML API
hh <- dr_get("HH", surveys = "NS-IBTS", years = 2020:2024, source = "xml")

# Prepare HH
hh <- hh |> dr_add_id() |> dr_add_date() |> dr_add_starttime()

# Prepare HL — join DataType from HH before CPUE arithmetic
hl <- dr_get("HL", surveys = "NS-IBTS", years = 2020:2024) |>
  dr_add_id() |>
  dplyr::left_join(dplyr::select(hh, .id, DataType, HaulDuration), by = ".id") |>
  dr_add_length_mm() |>
  dr_add_n_and_cpue()

# CPUE by length (numbers per hour per haul per species)
cpue    <- dr_cpue_by_length(hh, hl)
cpue_zf <- dr_cpue_by_length(hh, hl, zerofill = TRUE)   # with zero-fill

# Haul-level totals (numbers + weights, no length breakdown)
catch <- dr_cpue_by_haul(hh, hl)

# Spatial: assign survey strata to hauls
hh <- hh |> dr_assign_area()

# Quality control
dr_check_all(
  hh = hh,
  hl = hl |> dplyr::left_join(dplyr::select(hh, .id, DataType), by = ".id")
)

# Lookup tables
dr_lookup_fields      # field names, types, descriptions (~292 rows)
dr_lookup_vocabulary  # valid codes for categorical fields (~10 300 rows)
dr_lookup_species     # AphiaID ↔ Latin name ↔ common name (2000+ species)
dr_lookup_areas       # survey strata polygons (236 valid features, sf object)
```
